summary: Split required CI checks into focused workflows and add path-aware expensive-check gating.
rationale: The protected branch should keep stable required check names while CI work is split by responsibility and docs-only PRs avoid unnecessary Python and Workbench work.
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_ci_change_scope.py tests/test_pr_governance.py -q
uv run --group dev ruff check tools/ci_change_scope.py tests/test_ci_change_scope.py
uv run --group dev ty check tools/ci_change_scope.py tests/test_ci_change_scope.py
risks: Required status check names must stay stable while workflows are split.
Path-aware skipping must not hide Python, Workbench, or governance changes.
CodeQL must be added to branch protection after the split lands.
